data.title: Planet Noon News
data.description: 1. Wallets associated with Ethena's founder increased their holdings by 48 million ENA in three days; 2. SLERF briefly broke through $0.11, rising over 88% in 15 minutes; 3. Tom Lee: Market caution is rising, but there may be a reversal opportunity; 4. Binance will delist SLERF and CHZ perpetual contracts and adjust leverage; 5. OpenSea CEO: Plans to launch the SEA token in the first quarter of 2026; 6. Falcon Finance will launch its first NFT series "Perryverse" in October; 7. Hackers panic-sold another 7,816 ETH, with cumulative losses exceeding $13.4 million; 8. Tether Gold's market capitalization exceeded $2 billion, setting a new record high; 9. "Big Brother Maji" increased his ETH long position again, adding 220,000 USDC to Hyperliquid; 10. Smart money Hanmancheol's real-time short position on COAI was liquidated, with losses exceeding $13.4 million in three days. 11. A suspected Blockchain Capital address deposited 28 million SKY tokens to CEXs such as Binance. 12. The Crypto Fear Index is currently at 23, placing it in the extreme panic range.

data.description: According to OKX market data, the price of SLERF briefly broke through $0.4 and is currently trading at $0.3288, an increase of more than 500% within 1 hour.

data.title: Wallets associated with Ethena's founder increased their holdings of 48 million ENA in three days
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a multi-signature wallet associated with Ethena founder Guy Young (@gddog) has transferred a total of 48 million ENA tokens (worth approximately $20.41 million) from Binance and Bybit over the past three days. The on-chain address is 0xA7eEA194794D1BE1067C8fA7D8dbC8ca94A907a, and the wallet's specific purpose is currently unknown.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Advocates for Enhanced Metrics in Cryptographic Computing
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has expressed a desire for more researchers in zero-knowledge proofs (ZK) and fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) to provide the time ratio between encrypted and original computations. This metric, which compares the time taken for encrypted computations to that of original computations, offers a more hardware-independent and valuable insight than merely stating the number of operations per second (N ops) that can be performed. It helps in understanding the efficiency trade-offs when using cryptographic techniques instead of relying on trust.

Buterin acknowledges the challenges in calculating this ratio due to the heterogeneous nature of operations between execution and proof, particularly concerning SIMD/parallelization and memory access patterns. Despite these complexities and the partial hardware dependency of the ratio, he believes that the overhead factor remains a valuable indicator for developers. This is because developers typically know the time required for original computations, allowing them to easily estimate the impact of encryption by performing simple multiplication.

data.title: Tom Lee: Market caution is rising, but there may be reverse opportunities
data.description: BitMine Chairman Tom Lee wrote that the current market caution stems from factors such as US-China tensions, last week's massive deleveraging, concerns about the "cockroach effect" in private credit, and historically high volatility in October. However, he believes that investor sentiment has turned extremely negative (according to AAII data), which is a positive sign from a contrarian perspective. Currently, only 22% of fund managers are outperforming their benchmarks, suggesting a potential rally. Lee stated that his team maintains a "buy the dip" (BTFD) approach.

data.description:
St. Louis Fed President Alberto Musalem said he is ready to support another interest rate cut at the October 28–29 meeting.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fed-chief-signals-support-for-rate-cut/

data.title: Analysts Caution Cardano (ADA) May Drop Further Before $1 Rebound After 12% Dip
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) fell roughly 27% this week, slipping below the $0. 66 support as risk-off flows hit crypto. Bitcoin’s slide toward $104,000 and softer altcoin liquidity magnified downside, and on-chain data shows large holders leaning defensive. Related Reading: Is BlackRock About To Go Public With Ripple And XRP? Here’s What We Know Whale Flows Split as ADA Loses Support Santiment-tracked wallets holding 1–10 million ADA offloaded about 40 million ADA over seven days, while broader whale distribution reportedly reached 350 million ADA, pressuring price
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/cardano/analysts-caution-cardano-ada-may-drop-further-before-1-rebound-after-12-dip/

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $232 million yesterday, while none of the nine ETFs saw a net inflow.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $232 million yesterday (October 17th, EST). The Blackrock ETHA ETF saw the largest daily net outflow, with a net outflow of $146 million. ETHA's total net inflow has now reached $14.243 billion. The second largest daily net outflow was the Fidelity FETH ETF, with a net outflow of $30.6052 million. FETH's total net inflow has now reached $2.786 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs was $25.981 billion, with a net asset value ratio (market capitalization relative to the total Ethereum market capitalization) of 5.58%, and a total net inflow of $14.597 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $367 million yesterday, marking the third consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $367 million yesterday (October 17th, EST). The Blackrock IBIT ETF saw the largest daily net outflow, with a net outflow of $269 million. IBIT's total net inflow has now reached $64.982 billion. The second largest daily net outflow was from the Fidelity FBTC ETF, with a net outflow of $67.366 million. FBTC's total net inflow has now reached $12.545 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was $143.935 billion, with a net asset value ratio (market capitalization relative to the total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.75%, and cumulative net inflows reaching $61.539 billion.

data.title: Binance will delist SLERF and CHZ perpetual contracts and adjust leverage
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance Futures will delist the USDⓈ-MSLERFUSDT perpetual contract at 09:00 (UTC) on October 21, 2025, and the COIN-MCHZUSD perpetual contract at 10:00 (UTC) on the same day. Automatic liquidation and settlement will be implemented at these times. Additionally, Binance will update the leverage and margin tiers for the SLERFUSDT contract at 06:30 (UTC) on October 20, 2025. Users are advised to manage their positions in advance. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: OpenSea CEO: Plans to launch SEA token in the first quarter of 2026
data.description: OpenSea CEO Devin Finzer announced plans to launch the SEA token in the first quarter of 2026. 50% of the total SEA supply will be allocated to the community, with half allocated for initial claims. Participants in the OpenSea rewards program and OG users will be given priority. The launch of SEA will provide users with more ways to utilize the token, including staking, allowing them to stake SEA against their favorite tokens and collectibles. Furthermore, 50% of SEA revenue will be used to purchase SEA at launch, ensuring the token's value and the health of the ecosystem.

data.title: Falcon Finance will launch its first NFT series "Perryverse" in October
data.description: According to Falcon Finance, its first NFT series, "Perryverse," will begin whitelist minting on October 22nd, with public minting opening on October 23rd. Users must stake 1,000 $FF tokens to qualify for the whitelist draw. The whitelist minting price is 1,000 FF, while the public minting price is 2,000 FF, with a total supply of 3,500. The NFTs are themed around eggs, each with a unique appearance and hidden attributes. Their rarity will influence the second season's "Falcon Miles" bonus. Officials have confirmed that the whitelist snapshot will be October 20th.

data.title: Market Caution Amid Deleveraging and Credit Concerns, Says Tom Lee
data.description:
According to PANews, Tom Lee, co-founder of Fundstrat and chairman of BitMine, analyzed the current cautious state of the market on the X platform. He attributed this to several factors, including significant deleveraging in the crypto market last week, concerns over a 'cockroach crisis' in private credit, and the typical 'market explosion' seen in October. The term 'cockroach crisis' was recently used by JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon to describe potential risks in the U.S. credit market, suggesting that the discovery of one issue often indicates more underlying problems. This sector, valued at $3 trillion, is characterized by weak regulation and insufficient transparency.

Despite these concerns, Lee highlighted that negative market sentiment could lead to contrarian benefits. He noted that many fund managers are underperforming compared to industry benchmarks, which may prompt them to accelerate their pursuit of investment returns before the year's end. Consequently, Lee advised investors to 'Buy The Dip,' suggesting that current market conditions could present favorable buying opportunities.
